analysis.llm_summary: Selected top5 candidates have the highest scores from the shortlist, aligning well with frequent digits per position. The top50 extends this set by including numbers with slightly lower scores but still consistent with digit frequency trends and no duplicates, ensuring a strong and diverse selection.
